overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a covered pedestrian corridor transitioning to the neon-lit streets of Night City at night. The scene features wet reflective streets, towering skyscrapers with massive digital billboards, elevated monorail tracks, and a vibrant cyberpunk aesthetic with colorful neon lighting against the dark urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with traffic views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered pedestrian corridor with large windows showing blurred light trails of traffic outside

entered.detail: enclosed pedestrian walkway with concrete walls and ceiling
long horizontal windows showing motion-blurred lights from fast-moving traffic outside
continuous warm yellow LED strips running along the base of the corridor walls
futuristic vending kiosk with illuminated display and warning symbols
wall-mounted sign indicating the Wellsprings district of the city

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a covered pedestrian corridor with concrete walls and neon floor lighting. Large windows on the right side reveal blurred streaks of light from fast-moving traffic outside, while the interior features vending machines and district signage.

events.description: exits the covered pedestrian corridor onto the wet city street at night
yellow vehicle drives through the wet intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: exiting the pedestrian corridor onto the street, pausing briefly to observe the intersection before turning right

notable_agents.action: yellow car driving through the wet intersection, reflecting neon lights on its surface

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying 'AVANTE' advertisement on building facade
rain-soaked road surface reflecting neon lights and building illumination
tall modern building with illuminated windows rising above the street
bright red and blue neon signs for commercial establishments

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered corridor onto a wet city street at night, revealing a large intersection dominated by the AVANTE billboard. A yellow car drives through the intersection as the camera turns right to follow the sidewalk, with neon storefronts and glass skyscrapers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial boulevard with elevated transit

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the elevated monorail track running between skyscrapers
passing various holographic advertisements including a large circular rotating billboard

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk while observing the towering neon-lit buildings, digital billboards, and elevated monorail track overhead

entered.detail: orange elevated train track structure running high between the skyscrapers
large cylindrical rotating display showing colorful advertisements
vertical digital billboard displaying samurai imagery and chrome branding
futuristic public seating along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the neon-lit boulevard, the camera tilts up to reveal an elevated monorail track running between towering glass skyscrapers. The street features various digital billboards including a large circular rotating display and chrome samurai advertisements, with wet pavement reflecting the vibrant city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the enclosed confines of a pedestrian corridor into the expansive, neon-drenched streets of a futuristic metropolis. It begins inside a covered walkway with concrete walls and glowing floor lights, where blurred streaks of traffic are visible through large side windows. As the camera exits the corridor, the scene opens onto a wet city intersection dominated by a massive AVANTE billboard and the movement of a yellow car. The perspective then shifts to follow the sidewalk past vibrant storefronts and glass skyscrapers, with the wet pavement reflecting the surrounding colorful lights. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal an elevated monorail track suspended between towering buildings and a series of rotating digital displays and chrome samurai advertisements.
